title: phip:datacenter
description: Schema for the phip:datacenter attribute namespace. Covers rack-mount positioning, power, thermal, and network port inventory. Applicable to object types: component, assembly, system, location.

rack_units.description: Height in standard rack units (1U = 44.45 mm).

rack_position.description: Starting rack unit position (bottom of device), numbered from 1 at the bottom of the rack.

rack_side.description: Which side of the rack the device faces.

power_draw_watts.description: Rated or measured power draw in watts.

power_supply_count.description: Number of installed power supply units.

thermal_design_power_watts.description: Thermal design power (TDP) in watts — maximum heat dissipation.

inlet_temp_max_c.description: Maximum rated inlet air temperature in degrees Celsius.

network_ports.description: Inventory of network ports on this device.
